what: Test coverage for FSC-2417: 0% overall, 0 uncovered AC(s) — verdict=FAIL
why: Story FSC-2417 has 0.0% overall coverage with no Gherkin scenarios, 0% CRT automation, and zero UAT tests, despite having 10 FCA regulatory scenarios defined. This represents a critical compliance gap: Gherkin and CRT coverage are entirely absent, leaving functional behaviour unmapped and automated testing non-existent. To reach the FCA classification threshold, the QE engineer must immediately author Gherkin scenarios covering all acceptance criteria, implement CRT test cases with minimum 75% Apex coverage (85% if HIGH-FCA), and conduct UAT validation before the story can be merged.
